title: Roasted Syrian Lamb Kebabs
description: A traditional Syrian dish featuring roasted lamb kebabs with a hot chilli powder flavor, served on a wooden board. This low-carb-friendly recipe is perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, hot chilli powder, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a wooden board lined with parchment paper.
Roast the lamb kebabs in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until cooked through.
Brush the kebabs with pomegranate molasses during the last 5 minutes of cooking.
Sprinkle sumac over the kebabs and serve hot on the wooden board.
